management_guidance.context: Salesforce forecasts full-year 2026 (likely FY2027) revenue at $46.05 billion.
Adjusted EPS guidance for the same period.
Management raised FY30 revenue target to $63 billion (11% CAGR).

competitive_position.market_share: Salesforce holds 20.7% of global CRM market in 2026.
competitive_position.moat: Immense scale, brand power, and superior network effects create a durable competitive moat.
competitive_position.threats: Mounting competitive and regulatory pressures, with Microsoft Dynamics as the closest competitor at 12.9% market share.

key_facts.fact: FY2026 total revenue $41.5 billion, up 10% year-over-year.
key_facts.source: Q4 FY2026 earnings press release / Yahoo Finance transcript

key_facts.fact: Q4 FY2026 revenue $11.2 billion, up 12% year-over-year.
Agentforce and Data 360 ARR surged to $2.9 billion, up over 200% year-over-year.
key_facts.source: Q4 FY2026 earnings call transcript (Yahoo Finance)

key_facts.fact: Total RPO (Remaining Performance Obligations) $72 billion, up 14% year-over-year.
key_facts.caveat: RPO represents contracted but not yet recognized revenue.

key_facts.fact: Q1 FY2027 (period ending April 30, 2026) revenue $11.133 billion from SEC 10-Q.
Q1 CY2026 (calendar) adjusted EPS $3.88, beating estimates of $3.13.
key_facts.caveat: Calendar quarter vs fiscal quarter may differ.

analyst_thesis.bull_case: Analysts see a 30% rebound potential in 2026, driven by strong fundamentals, AI/agentic platforms like Agentforce, and record $25 billion debt-funded buyback. Revenue growth of 10% in FY2026 and raised FY30 target to $63B support long-term optimism.
analyst_thesis.bear_case: Stock down 30% year-to-date in 2026 due to deceleration to 8.7% revenue growth, mounting competitive and regulatory pressures. The debt-funded buyback adds financial risk.

key_institutions.thesis: Expects improved performance in 2026; viewed Q4 results as mixed.
Cited the company's strong Q4 results despite mixed view.

data_quality.notes: EDGAR provides only total revenue, no segment breakdown. Tavily search yields detailed financials and guidance from multiple sources, but some figures (e.g., market share) vary slightly across sources; most consistent values are used.
